standard: GreenSeam / ECCO / M&M round-duct start collar (SMACNA)
description: Round-duct takeoff/starting collar: a rolled sheet-metal barrel with a stiffening top bead, a ring of trapezoidal base tabs that bend flat onto the duct, and an optional integral butterfly damper on a diametral shaft. One solid.
source: GreenSeam tabbed/spin-in start-collar spec sheets + ECCO / M&M submittals (diameter, body, bead, tabs, damper); gauge per ASTM A653 / SMACNA; tab count/width proportion
